steps.name: Given I am on the HOME page
When I clock in the timesheet with PIN "6566"
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('6', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('5', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('6', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title').filter({ hasText: 'PASSWORD' }) }).getByText('6', { exact: true })
Click locator('div[role="dialog"]').filter({ has: locator('#alert-dialog-title') }).locator('div.MuiDialogActions-root').getByRole('button', { name: 'CONFIRM', exact: true })
Then I should see the employee "Willow" in the employee list
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the "Manicure" service
When I add the "Manicure" service to my cart
Then I should see my cart showing 1 item added
When I click on the total price of "Manicure"
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
When I select the "Gift" payment type
Then I should see the "ID GIFT CARD" name
When I fill the Gift card with "0903"
And I click on the "CHECK BALANCE" button
Expect "toBeVisible" getByRole('button', { name: 'CHECK BALANCE', exact: true })
Click getByRole('button', { name: 'CHECK BALANCE', exact: true })
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the CLOSED_TICKETS page
When I wait for the page fully loaded
And I wait for the page fully loaded
And I reopen ticket with payment amount "$17.50"

Expect "toBeVisible" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$17.50' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Expect "toContainText" locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$17.50' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()

Click locator('.MuiDataGrid-row').filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentTotal"]').filter({ hasText: '$17.50' }) }).filter({ has: locator('[data-field="paymentMethod"]').filter({ hasText: /.+/ }) }).first()
Then I should see the "Ticket View" screen
And I should see the user info "Willow" in the ticket
When I click on the "PAY" button
Then I should see the text "PAYMENT TICKET" visible
And I should see the text "PAYMENT HISTORY" visible
And I should see the payment history "Gift (0903)" visible
When I remove payment history "Gift" in ticket view
And I select the "Cash" payment type
And I click on the element with id "payment"
Then I should see a popup dialog with title "Close Ticket"
When I click on the "OK" button in the popup dialog
Then I should be redirected to HOME page
Given I am on the GIFT_CARD_BALANCE page
Then I should see the first date is not today in the gift card detail list
And I should see the first type "ActivateNew" in the gift card detail list
